tickets.title: Update ticket-summaries JSON schema to include labels and numeric estimates
tickets.summary: Update powr-tickets agent definition to specify numeric estimates (1-8 scale) instead of string S/M/L, and add labels array field for model selection signals.

tickets.title: Add model selection signal extraction CLI command
tickets.summary: Create powr-workmaxxing model-signals CLI command that extracts cheap signals (estimate, labels, complexity, diff stats) for model routing decisions via file-based extraction.

tickets.title: Add dynamic model selection logic to SKILL.md orchestrator
tickets.summary: Add signal-reading and model-override logic to SKILL.md execute flow with testable selectModel() function for routing agents to appropriate models based on signals.

tickets.title: Add agent definition installation to install command
tickets.summary: Extend powr-workmaxxing install to symlink powr-*.md agent files into target repos with file-copy fallback for unsupported environments.

tickets.title: End-to-end validation and documentation
tickets.summary: Validate multi-agent workflow end-to-end with smoke test script, update architecture documentation, add inline comments to SKILL.md explaining model selection logic.
